interfaces.name: getHomepageSummary
interfaces.description: Get featured services, products, and special offers for the homepage hero and primary sections.

highlightLabel.description: User-friendly label like '15% off duct cleaning'

interfaces.name: getActiveProductCategories
interfaces.description: Get active product categories for navigation menus and product browsing.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for product listing/search pages based on category.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search and filter products for listing pages or header search, including furnaces and smart thermostats.

onlyActive.description: If true, only returns active products.

badges.description: Display labels such as 'High efficiency', 'Best seller'.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a single product, including specifications, ratings, and applicable promotions.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product shown on product detail page.

installationServiceId.description: Service.id used when scheduling installation, e.g., 'thermostat_installation'.

interfaces.name: createInstallationQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an installation quote request for a product from its detail page.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Product.id for which the quote is requested (from product detail context).

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional project notes or timing preferences.

interfaces.name: getBookableServicesAndOptions
interfaces.description: Get list of services that can be booked via the schedule service page, including booking options and flags.

defaultServiceId.description: Optional default service to preselect, e.g., most common repair.

interfaces.name: validateServiceAreaByZip
interfaces.description: Validate whether a ZIP code is within the service area before allowing booking.

interfaces.name: getAvailableTimeSlots
interfaces.description: Get available appointment time slots for a given service, date, and ZIP code.

parameters.name: durationMinutes
parameters.description: Requested duration if different from default.

parameters.name: offerId
parameters.description: Optional SpecialOffer.id if booking with a promotion.

interfaces.name: createBooking
interfaces.description: Create a booking for standard service, emergency service, installation, consultation, or promotion-based appointments.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Optional Product.id for installations like thermostat_installation.

parameters.name: offerId
parameters.description: Optional SpecialOffer.id to apply a promotion (e.g., duct cleaning discount).

parameters.name: appointmentStart
parameters.description: Start of the chosen time window in ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: appointmentEnd
parameters.description: End of the chosen time window in ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: timeWindowLabel
parameters.description: Human-readable time window label, e.g., '9:00 AM – 11:00 AM'.

parameters.name: problemDescription
parameters.description: Detailed issue description, used especially for emergency requests.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Optional notes for consultations, e.g., indoor air quality concerns.

interfaces.name: getBookingDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch booking details for confirmation pages or status checks.

parameters.name: bookingId
parameters.description: ID of the booking returned by createBooking.

interfaces.name: getMaintenancePlanFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for maintenance plans (coverage, billing term, price).

interfaces.name: getMaintenancePlans
interfaces.description: List maintenance plans with filtering and sorting for the maintenance plans page.

onlyActive.description: If true, only active plans are shown.

interfaces.name: getMaintenancePlanDetails
interfaces.description: Get all details about a specific maintenance plan for its detail page.

interfaces.name: addMaintenancePlanToCart
interfaces.description: Add a maintenance plan to the internally managed cart, creating the cart if it does not exist.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents and pricing summary for the cart page and checkout pre-review.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific item in the cart.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the cart item to update.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the cart item to remove.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get cart and order totals for the checkout page, including plan names and pricing.

interfaces.name: placeOrder
interfaces.description: Complete checkout and create an order for the current cart, capturing billing and payment details.

interfaces.name: getSpecialOfferFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the special offers page, including categories and discount types.

interfaces.name: getSpecialOffers
interfaces.description: List special offers with filtering by category, discount, and price for the specials page.

serviceId.description: Limit offers to those applying to a specific Service.id.

interfaces.name: getSpecialOfferDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific special offer, including applicable services and discount information.

interfaces.name: getServiceDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific service, including emergency and consultation options.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Service.id from service_detail page URL, e.g., 'heating_repair', 'duct_cleaning'.

maxDaysAhead.description: Maximum days in future allowed for consultation, e.g., 7.

interfaces.name: getFinancingPlans
interfaces.description: List available financing plans for the financing overview page, with filtering for 0% APR and term length.

interfaces.name: getFinancingPlanDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific financing plan for its detail page and application form.

interfaces.name: createFinancingApplication
interfaces.description: Start a financing application for a selected plan and purchase amount.

interfaces.name: getBlogArticles
interfaces.description: List blog/articles for the blog listing page with search and tag filters.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetails
interfaces.description: Get the full content and metadata for a blog article, including recommended services.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact or inquiry form from the contact page.

interfaces.name: getServiceAreasSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of service areas and ZIP codes for About Us and Contact pages.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the current active cart or create a new one, storing the cart id internally.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate subtotal, tax, and total for a cart based on its items.

helperFunctions.name: _validateBookingRequest
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate booking input (service availability, service area, time slot availability) before creating a Booking.

helperFunctions.name: _reserveTimeSlot
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to tentatively reserve a time slot in the booking system when createBooking is called.

helperFunctions.name: _generateOrderNumber
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to generate a unique human-friendly orderNumber for new orders.
